items.title: Walt Disney, McDonald's, Palantir Set To Report Earnings
items.description: Key earnings this week will include PLTR, ON, AMD, CAT, & PFE. With Trump's revised tariff orders, investors will be keeping an eye on economic reports releasing next week.

items.title: How McDonald’s (MCD) Maintains its Status as a Leading Income Stock
items.description: McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) is included among the 11 Best Income Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) is easily recognized by its golden arches, but most of its locations— around 95 percent— are run by franchisees rather than the company itself. These franchised restaurants generate roughly 60% of the company’s yearly revenue. […]
